prompt: Replace the plain background of the Telegram chat in image 1 with the pink-blue swirl background from image 2, and place the green online status dot from image 3 next to “Eva Summer” in very small size in the top contact name bar indicating she is online.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the Telegram chat screenshot. Replace the blue gradient background of the main chat panel with the pink and blue swirl pattern from image 2. Additionally, place a very small green dot, matching the style of image 3, directly to the right of the name 'Eva Summer' in the top header bar to indicate online status.
objects: Pink and blue swirl pattern as the background of the main chat panel
Very small green dot to the right of 'Eva Summer'
